filesystem.description: Read and write course content files and skill files
use_cases: Read chapter markdown files from content/chapters/
Read quiz JSON files from content/quizzes/
Write new content files during admin operations

fetch.description: Fetch content from Cloudflare R2 URLs and external sources
use_cases: Retrieve chapter content from R2 bucket URLs
Fetch media assets for course chapters
Download quiz bank updates from R2

postgres.description: Direct PostgreSQL queries for admin and analytics

rules.phase1: NO MCP servers allowed in phase1/
rules.phase2: filesystem and fetch MCP servers only
